rows.name: Architecture Read-Only
rows.description: Read-only access to architecture artifacts (ADRs, API contracts, dependency graph). Used by the ideation and review phases to gather context without modifying state.

rows.name: Development Write
rows.description: Write access to source repositories, work items, and test artifacts. Bounded by repository branch protection rules and the connected VCS provider's permission model.

rows.name: Security Scan
rows.description: Read-only access combined with execution of security scanning tools (SCA, SAST, secret scanning). Findings are written as typed artifacts but do not modify application state.

rows.name: Production Deployment (Gated)
rows.description: Production deployment execution. ALWAYS requires an explicit human approval gate per Forge Rule 3; the gate is enforced by the policy engine before any tool in this bundle runs.

rows.name: Ideation Propose
rows.description: Read-only access to project intelligence plus the ability to propose (but not commit) new artifacts. Proposals are surfaced in the Ideation Center for human review.

rows.name: Refactor Execute
rows.description: Execution of bounded refactors across the codebase with automatic rollback on test failure. Refactors are restricted to files explicitly listed in the run; no exploratory changes are permitted.
